mapper.select: SELECT b.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name, l.start_date as lease_start_date, l.end_date as lease_end_date FROM bills b LEFT JOIN leases l ON b.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id OR b.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id OR b.tenant_id = t.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bills( id, landlord_id, lease_id, property_id, tenant_id, bill_type, amount, due_date, paid_amount, paid_date, payment_method, payment_receipt, status, overdue_days, overdue_fee, remark, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES( #{id}, #{landlordId}, #{leaseId}, #{propertyId}, #{tenantId}, #{billType}, #{amount}, #{dueDate}, #{paidAmount}, #{paidDate}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentReceipt}, #{status}, #{overdueDays}, #{overdueFee}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE bills SET amount = #{amount}, due_date = #{dueDate}, paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, paid_date = #{paidDate}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, payment_receipt = #{paymentReceipt}, status = #{status}, overdue_days = #{overdueDays}, overdue_fee = #{overdueFee}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE bills SET status = #{status}, paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, paid_date = #{paidDate}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, payment_receipt = #{paymentReceipt}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name, l.start_date as lease_start_date, l.end_date as lease_end_date FROM bills b LEFT JOIN leases l ON b.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id OR b.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id OR b.tenant_id = t.id WHERE b.landlord_id = #{landlordId} ORDER BY b.due_date DESC

SELECT b.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name, l.start_date as lease_start_date, l.end_date as lease_end_date FROM bills b LEFT JOIN leases l ON b.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id OR b.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id OR b.tenant_id = t.id WHERE b.status = '待支付' AND b.due_date < #{today}

SELECT b.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name, l.start_date as lease_start_date, l.end_date as lease_end_date FROM bills b LEFT JOIN leases l ON b.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id OR b.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id OR b.tenant_id = t.id WHERE b.lease_id = #{leaseId} ORDER BY b.due_date ASC

SELECT b.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name, l.start_date as lease_start_date, l.end_date as lease_end_date FROM bills b LEFT JOIN leases l ON b.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id OR b.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id OR b.tenant_id = t.id WHERE l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR b.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY b.due_date ASC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) FROM bills WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND status = '已支付'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM bills WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND status = '待支付'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bills WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND status = #{status}

SELECT b.*, p.name as property_name, p.address as property_address, t.name as tenant_name, l.start_date as lease_start_date, l.end_date as lease_end_date FROM bills b LEFT JOIN leases l ON b.lease_id = l.id LEFT JOIN properties p ON l.property_id = p.id OR b.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tenants t ON l.tenant_id = t.id OR b.tenant_id = t.id WHERE b.landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND b.status IN ('待支付', '逾期') ORDER BY b.due_date ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bills WHERE lease_id = #{leaseId} AND due_date = #{dueDate}
SELECT * FROM bills WHERE status = '待支付' ORDER BY due_date ASC
